creator: hjensen@gmx.de
text:
Still not working with install media for FreeBSD 12.1, still hangs at the "EFI Consoles" stage.

However, a UEFI install of GhostBSD 20.04.1 worked. After that I installed FreeBSD in legacy mode on the Partition created by GhostBSD, et voila, I can boot FreeBSD with UEFI using the GhostBSD EFI loader.

Now, what does GhistBSD differently?
